Return shape: { amountOut, sqrtPriceX96After, tickAfter, gasEstimate }

Shape includes poolId, tokens, balances, rates, fee, A
Shape includes i, K/B/k, baseReserve/B, quoteReserve/Q, baseTarget/B0, quoteTarget/Q0, rState/R

Pool at target reserve ratio
Excess base tokens (price below peg)
Excess quote tokens (price above peg)
Fixed-point precision used across balancer, dodo, woofi
Q64.96 fixed-point bit shift
V = prod(B_i ^ w_i); swap formula uses fixed-point powDown (ln + exp Taylor series)
A * n^n * sum(x_i) + D = A * n^n * D + D^(n+1) / (n^n * prod(x_i)); solved via Newton iteration
Piecewise quadratic pricing (PM algorithm) + linear replenishment; 3 reserve states (ONE, ABOVE_ONE, BELOW_ONE)
Uniswap V2 style: amountOut = reserveOut * amountIn * 997 / (reserveIn * 1000 + amountIn * 997)
Liquidity allocated within tick ranges; price moves along sqrt price curve; swap crosses initialized ticks and adjusts liquidity via liquidityNet
Synthetic Proactive Market Maker with price, coeff (gamma), spread; per-base-token state; quote-mediated two-hop routing
96-bit fractional precision for sqrt price representation (bigint << 96)
sqrt(1.0001^tick) computed via 20 precomputed magic constants masking bit positions
Used in Curve (getD, getY) and Balancer stable (calculateBalancerStableInvariant, getTokenBalanceGivenStableInvariant); convergent to diff <= 1
V3 simulator uses O(log N) binary search to find next initialized tick instead of bitmap traversal
Sorted initialized ticks cached in WeakMap keyed by pool state object; invalidated on tickVersion change
x^y computing via ln(x) Taylor series (bit-shift reduction + 20 terms) then exp(x) Taylor series (30 terms); max 255 iterations
solveQuadraticFunctionForTrade (V0,V1,delta,i,k) uses quadratic formula with k*V0^2/V1 penalty term; generalIntegrate computes fair amount below peg
When neither token is the quote token: sellBase on inKey -> fee -> buyBase on outKey, using shared spread = max(left,right)/2

Gas estimation, fee management, background Gas Oracle for HFT
Per-account nonce manager for rapid sequential submission without waiting for on-chain confirmation
Polygon private mempool transaction submission with parallel racing across configured relays

Catalog of known contract addresses with ABI expectations per protocol

nodes.label: HyperSync Pagination — page loop with nextBlock cursor, archiveHeight, maxPages guard, consecutive empty early termination
Registry SQLite schema — pools, pool_state, checkpoints, rollback_guard, token_meta, pool_fees, liquidity_events, arb_history
Reorg handling — rollbackToBlock deletes state/pools/liquidity_events past block, reactivates removed pools, resets checkpoints
Asset caching — RegistryAssetCache with tokenMetaCache, tokenDecimalsCache, poolFeeCache, lazy fetch-through
Liquidity change detection — compares reserve/liquidity bigint values, records large_change/near_empty/disabled events
BigInt codec — rehydrateStateData maps bigint fields per protocol class (V2, V3, CURVE, BALANCER, DODO, WOOFI), stringifyWithBigInt serializes
Arbitrage history — logArbResult inserts BigInt amounts as strings, getArbStats aggregates net_profit via JS BigInt to avoid SQL CAST precision loss
Repository facade — createRegistryRepositories wraps RegistryService into typed sub-repositories: pools, checkpoints, tokens, fees, history, maintenance
Topic normalization — normalizeTopic validates 64-char hex, topic0ForSignature caches viem-encoded event signatures
